form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 365m. Last start finished 7th over 365m at this track beaten 11 lengths (21.41) behind Market Maverick in a Grade 5 on April 13. Leading contender.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a sensational early split but had to be content with second when clocking 20.72 over 365m at this track. The form out of the last run measures up. Hard to beat.
